title: Looking for a LONDON BASED ONLY Monday.com specialist
excerpt: Hi, we are a London based sustainability consultancy based in London. We are looking for an especialist to help us to revise the processes we are currently creating and help us with the automations. UK based individuals …

posts.author: WilliamdR (Willliam del Rivero)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, we are a London based sustainability consultancy based in London. We are looking for an especialist to help us to revise the processes we are currently creating and help us with the automations. UK based individuals only please.
We are planning to launch end of May and would like to work with an especialist that can help us with the following:

  • Revise and correct processes (CRM and Project management)
  • Create Automatations
  • Train 1 member of staff on platform usage

Please get in touch for more information.

Thanks.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @WilliamdR and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

Although the CarbonWeb team is not based in the UK we have done work with monday users from all over the world. Considering our entire team is based in-house, we are able to offer a world class experience when it comes to custom solution development, optimization of existing structure, and dedicated support on finished solutions.

Our team is based in Cleveland, Ohio and I think it would be worthwhile for us to connect. Our initial consultations are entirely free and I would love to see how you might be able to leverage our team.

If you would like to schedule this call with me please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get this project started!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello @WilliamdR I hope you had a good easter!

We At Omnitas Consulting are the biggest and oldest monday.com platinum partners. We recently opened up an office in the UK. I am personally over in London about 25% of my time. The rest of the time is Spent in Stockholm Sweden.

I do recommend that you get in touch with Robbie Perris our Enterprice Business Consultant. YOu can reach him at robbie@omnitas.com.

With regards,

posts.author: WilliamdR (Willliam del Rivero)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Thomas,

Thank you for your response and for getting in touch. I will get in touch with Robbie when the time is right. At the moment we are starting to create processes and planning the migration from the old system to Monday.com. We have two sessions booked with Monday.com but I’m confident that we will need further assistance setting up automations and optimising processes. I think we are looking Mid May to start rolling this across the company. The ideal format would be billable hours and an occasional zoom to raise concerns and training.

Let’s stay in touch with the Mid May aprox date in mind.

Kind regards,

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @WilliamdR,

Welcome to the monday com community!

Since you are looking for a UK-based monday com specialist to create automations, revise and optimize processes (CRM and Project management), and train at least 1 of your staff member on the platform usage, I recommend you get in touch with a certified monday expert. The reason is that they have a pool of talented and experienced monday.com consultants who can help you address the challenges you are dealing with. Besides this, they will educate you on how to make the most of monday Work OS.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
